meta.design_note: 純欲風 (innocent-yet-alluring) blend, or describe the chosen flavor. Adult persona. Content stays at mainstream fashion-influencer level — alluring, never explicit.

appearance.face: innocent / clean / girl-next-door — soft no-makeup makeup
appearance.build: fit and toned — defined collarbones, healthy hourglass line

persona.archetype: one-line archetype, e.g. The Pure-Desire Girl-Next-Door

aesthetic.mood: soft, clean, sunlit, high-end; innocent warmth with a confident edge
aesthetic.editing_style: natural soft grade, keep real skin texture — no heavy smoothing or body warping

brand_dont: Anything explicit, adult, or NSFW — keep the persona alluring but classy

social.engagement_style: warm, highly interactive; A/B polls; every post ends on an open question

ai_prompts.engine_notes: Optimized for Midjourney v6 / Stable Diffusion. Use base_character_prompt as anchor + a scene block. Lock one seed face via --cref / IP-Adapter / Higgsfield Soul.
ai_prompts.base_character_prompt: A ultra-realistic 8k photo of a 22-year-old female influencer, [ethnicity], innocent and beautiful doll-like face, clean glowing skin, subtle soft makeup, natural messy long wavy [hair] hair, captivating [eyes] eyes, friendly smile. Extremely fit and toned hourglass figure, defined collarbones. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0
ai_prompts.negative_prompt_sd: explicit, nsfw, nudity, deformed, extra fingers, bad anatomy, oversaturated, heavy smoothing, plastic skin, watermark, logo, text
